mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET YONGIN_INBOUNDED = 'Y', YONGIN_INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, YONGIN_INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, YONGIN_INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblReturnInboundId}

UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET AGENCY_OUTBOUNDED = 'Y', AGENCY_OUTBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, AGENCY_OUTBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, AGENCY_OUTBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblReturnInboundId}

UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET YONGIN_INBOUNDED = 'Y', YONGIN_INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, YONGIN_INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, YONGIN_INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), YONGIN_INBOUND_REMARK = #{inboundRemark}, UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID IN
#{id}

UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET AGENCY_OUTBOUNDED = 'Y', AGENCY_OUTBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, AGENCY_OUTBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, AGENCY_OUTBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), AGENCY_OUTBOUND_REMARK = #{outboundRemark}, UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID IN
#{id}

UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET IS_OUTBOUND_TARGET = #{outboundTargetYn}, UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID IN
#{id}
